title: Live price fetching for the holdings tracker
description: Replace the static `currentValue` numbers in data/sample-holdings.json with values fetched from a real price source on page load, so the holdings table reflects today's market. Will involve a small fetch (or a backend proxy if CORS becomes a problem), light caching, and an "updated at" indicator under the totals row.
blockers: Needs a price-data integration tool exposed to the agent (or a no-auth web-fetch surface) before the agent can author the fetch logic against a known endpoint. Today the agent has no way to call a price API.
